nasb.text: But the midwives feared God, and did not do as the king of Egypt had commanded them, but let the boys live.

esv.text: But the midwives feared God and did not do as the king of Egypt commanded them, but let the male children live.

cnv.text: 但是，接生婦卻敬畏　神，不照著埃及王吩咐她們的去作，竟讓男孩活著。

ccb.text: 但这两个接生婆敬畏上帝，没有执行王的命令，而是保留了男婴的性命。
